seoTitle: Babbage Island vs Badgerin Rock — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Babbage Island and Badgerin Rock. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Babbage Island vs Badgerin Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Babbage Island and Badgerin Rock.
heading: Babbage Island vs Badgerin Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Babbage Island, Western Australia and Badgerin Rock, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Babbage Island has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Badgerin Rock (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Babbage Island or Badgerin Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Babbage Island has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Badgerin Rock scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Babbage Island scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Badgerin Rock scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Babbage Island or Badgerin Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Babbage Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
